name: Flogos, the Ogdoadic Boundless
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>溟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>漠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すなはら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－フロギ
desc: If this card is sent from the field to the GY, or Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls, and 1 monster in their GY with an equal or higher ATK than that target; Special Summon that monster from the GY to their field, and if you do, send that other monster they control to the GY. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Flogos, the Ogdoadic Boundless" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent from the field to the GY, or Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls, and 1 monster in their GY with an equal or higher ATK than that target; Special Summon that monster from the GY to their field, and if you do, send that other monster they control to the GY. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Flogos, the Ogdoadic Boundless" once per turn.
eff: If this card is sent from the field to the GY, or Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls, and 1 monster in their GY with an equal or higher ATK than that target; Special Summon that monster from the GY to their field, and if you do, send that other monster they control to the GY. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY; add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Flogos, the Ogdoadic Boundless" once per turn.

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
